# Sideband Lab

> Interactive visualizations that map the agent-era infrastructure shift. Companion to the Sideband newsletter (https://sideband.pub).

Each project is a small data-driven argument: a chart, a simulation, or an interactive layout, paired with sourced data and the underlying methodology.

## About
- Author: Shawn Yeager (https://shawnyeager.com)
- Newsletter: https://sideband.pub
- Source code: https://github.com/shawnyeager/sideband-lab
- License: CC BY 4.0 unless noted otherwise per project

## Projects
- [Where the 430× actually goes](https://lab.sideband.pub/inference-trap/) — Token prices fell 430× since 2021, but resident agents burn 100× the tokens of a chatbot query, so net savings fall to 4.3× (Goldman Sachs data, 2026-06-03)
- [The AI market hyperscalers can't reach](https://lab.sideband.pub/cloud-cant-follow/) — Armada raised $230M for modular AI data centers at sites the cloud can't serve: military bases, oil platforms, air-gapped facilities (2026-05-29)
- [Task complete. Safety violated.](https://lab.sideband.pub/safety-trap/) — BeSafe-Bench results across 13 production-grade agents; none cleared 40% safe task completion (2026-05-27)
- [The return of the computer](https://lab.sideband.pub/return-of-the-computer/) — How agents reversed three decades of shrinking infrastructure primitives (2026-03-17)
- [Payment Required](https://lab.sideband.pub/http-402/) — x402 vs L402 protocol comparison for agent payments (2026-03-07)
- [Agent-Era Infrastructure Map](https://lab.sideband.pub/map/) — Openness scoring of companies and protocols across five infrastructure layers (2026-03-03)
- [U.S. GDP Status](https://lab.sideband.pub/status/) — Parody status page treating AI provider uptime as a macroeconomic indicator (2026-03-02)
- [Agent payments have a three-body problem](https://lab.sideband.pub/three-body-problem/) — Force simulation of the gravitational fight between state regulators, card networks, and open protocols (2026-03-01)

## Audience
Founders, builders, and investors following AI infrastructure shifts. Assumed familiarity with APIs, payment rails, agent architectures, stablecoins, and Lightning.
